A.rationale: Mirrors err()-returned convention, minimal handlers.py change; but misses the real route-collision trap, flagging only a secondary concurrency case.

B.rationale: Fixes path collision via method-keyed routes, but modifies framework beyond stated scope and admits dispatch may still need updating—incomplete and invasive.

D.rationale: Tightest convention fidelity (.format/err-returned/ok named), minimal edit, fastest, and precisely surfaces the real _ROUTES path-shadowing trap as a sharp question.
